note:
No HOT squeezes at all? Zero? You gotta be kidding me. Not a single name in this market is scoring HOT right now, and that *screams* something loud and clear: the market’s coasting, folks. It’s like we’re on a wide-open road with clear skies, and nobody wants to hit the gas. **Risk appetite is flatlining—neither fear nor euphoria is in charge.** The scoreboard reads neutrality, and in this game, that’s as much a signal as anything. The crowd’s sitting tight, waiting for a reason to cheer—or boo. 

So what gives? Look around. None of the major sectors are lighting the world on fire right now, but they’re not crumbling either. Energy ($OXY, $APA), software ($SE, $BBAI), and crypto names ($ETHA, $COIN) are all just sort of hanging out, catching some rays but not playing in the game. The S&P is treading water, the VIX is all but asleep, and the dollar isn’t making any wild moves. It’s like the market’s hosting a backyard barbecue, waiting for the fireworks to start later. My guess? The fireworks are coming. They always do. But for today, it’s all about patience with a side of positioning.

Now, if you’re looking for HOT setups, the cupboard’s bare. No doubt about it. But just because there’s no immediate momentum signal doesn’t mean there’s no juice to squeeze. The WARM list is also taking a nap, but that’s okay. This is when we lean into the work we’ve done over the past weeks—this portfolio wasn’t built to run just on today’s fuel. Look at $ETHA, $BLSH, and $NIO: all full positions, all with room to stretch their legs. $ETHA is still our crypto leader, and while $NIO has been quieter, don’t sleep on Chinese names—they tend to move in waves, and we’re just waiting for the next surge. 

Then there’s the uranium pocket—absolute beasts lately. $UUUU and $MP have both delivered 2x returns, and they’re still moving. That’s leadership. Watch $UEC and $SMR—these have room. Energy is alive too. $OXY has been sneaky strong; buyers are stepping in at every pullback. The story here? Materials. Commodities. Energy. These names are quietly saying that the structural trade in hard assets is far from over. Are we listening?

For today, all eyes on breadth. Flip through your charts—every sector, every index. Look at where the buyers actually *are*. If they show up, you’ll know, but if they don’t, we’ll keep grinding it out. Risk isn’t off—it’s just catching its breath. Full stop. 

The market might be sending us mixed messages, but you’ve got your cheat code: focus on the plays that are already working. We know where the strength is. Don’t overthink it, and let the game come to you. And the bears? They’ve got nothing.
